{{Infobox character
| name = Blackflame Emperor
| aliases = Blackflame Emperor Naru Huan
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Blackflame Emperor, Overlord
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]], also known as the [[Blackflame]] [[Emperor]], is the [[Overlord]] and Patriarch of the [[Naru clan]] who rules the [[Blackflame Empire]]. A powerfully built man with a short beard, piercing eyes, and [[emerald]] wings, he sits upon a throne of gold and [[jade]] in his capital, [[Blackflame City]]. He holds several titles, including Guardian of the West and Protector of the East. As a ruler, he manages his territory's administration and oversees powerful subordinates such as Underlords like [[Chon Ma]] and his sister, [[Naru Saeya]]. In combat, [[the Emperor]] is a formidable opponent who utilizes an [[Overlord]]-level greatsword forged from the [[Path of Black Flame]]. He is capable of wielding destructive green wind madra and [[black dragon's breath]], often incorporating [[Blackflame]] into his techniques to increase their force. Despite the empire facing significant instability due to external threats like the [[Bleeding Phoenix]], the [[Seishen Kingdom]], and [[dragon]] incursions in the [[Wasteland]], [[Naru Huan]] maintains his authority through both political maneuvering and martial prowess. He has shown respect to high-ranking figures such as [[Archlord]] [[Eithan]] Arelius and has expressed profound awe toward [[Lindon]]'s rapid advancement to [[Sage]] status.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Saeya]] is the [[Blackflame Emperor]]'s little sister.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|There was a last [[Blackflame Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blackflame Emperor]] was discussed for execution due to dereliction of duty.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Blackflame Emperor]] is an [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Blackflame Emperor]] issued an order for [[Lowgold]] or higher [[sacred artists]] to report to the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Blackflame Emperor]] [[Naru Huan]] has wide [[emerald]] wings.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“How advanced is he?” Jaran asked.

“Overlord.”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
